title: Mock Test 66 - Making Requests & Offers
description: Requests ও Offers Expression নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Could you please, Would you mind, Can I, Shall I, Would you like, I'd like to, Let me, Do you mind if — সঠিক ব্যবহার।

questions.question: Polite request করার সবচেয়ে ভালো উপায়?
questions.explanation: 'Could you please...?' = one of the most polite request forms।

questions.question: 'Would you mind...?' দিয়ে request করার সঠিক structure?
questions.explanation: 'Would you mind + Ving' — যেমন: Would you mind opening the door?

questions.question: অনুমতি চাওয়ার সঠিক উপায়?
options: Is it okay if I use your phone?
questions.explanation: 'Can I/May I/Do you mind if I' — সবগুলোই permission চাওয়ার জন্য।

questions.question: কাউকে কিছু offer করার সঠিক উপায়?
options: I want to give you tea.
questions.explanation: 'Would you like some tea?' = polite offer।

questions.question: 'Shall I open the window?' — এটি কী বোঝায়?
questions.explanation: 'Shall I...?' = offer to do something for someone।

questions.question: 'I'd like to suggest something.' — এটি কী ধরনের phrase?
questions.explanation: 'I'd like to...' = polite way to offer a suggestion।

questions.question: 'Do you mind if I sit here?' — এর সঠিক উত্তর কী?
options: Yes (if you don't mind), No (if you mind)
questions.explanation: 'Do you mind if I sit here?' → 'No, go ahead.' (না আমি কিছু মনে করি না) বা 'Yes, I'm sorry.' (হ্যাঁ আমি মনে করি = বসতে দেব না)।

questions.question: 'Let me help you.' — এটি কী ধরনের expression?
questions.explanation: 'Let me help you.' = offer of assistance (volunteering to help)।

questions.question: 'I was wondering if you could help me.' — এটি কেমন?
questions.explanation: 'I was wondering if...' = indirect/very polite request।

questions.question: অফার decline করার সঠিক উপায়?
questions.explanation: 'No, thank you.' / 'I'm fine, thanks.' — সবগুলোই polite refusal।

questions.question: Error: 'Can you please to help me?' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Can you please help me?' — 'to' লাগবে না। Modal (can) + V1 (help)

questions.question: Error: 'Would you mind to open the door?' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Would you mind opening the door?' — 'mind + Ving' (not 'to V1')।

questions.question: Error: 'I want that you help me.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'I want you to help me.' — 'want + object + to V1' structure।

questions.question: Error: 'Let me to go.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Let me go.' — 'let + object + V1' (to ছাড়া)।

questions.question: Fill: 'Would you like me ___ (help) you?'
questions.explanation: 'Would you like me to help you?' — 'would like + object + to V1'।

questions.question: Fill: 'Could you please ___ (send) me the details?'
questions.explanation: 'Could you please + V1 (send)' — modal এর পরে base form।

questions.question: Fill: 'I would ___ if you could help.'
questions.explanation: 'I would appreciate it if you could...' = polite request।

questions.question: Fill: '___ I get you a glass of water?'
questions.explanation: 'Shall I...?' = offer to do something (BrE common)।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আপনি কি দরজাটা খুলে দেবেন?' (polite)
options: Could you please open the door?
questions.explanation: 'Could you please open the door?' = polite request।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আমি কি আপনার কলমটি ব্যবহার করতে পারি?'
questions.explanation: 'Can I use your pen?' / 'May I use your pen?' = polite permission request।
